title: clinopodium uhligii var. obtusifolium
intro: Clinopodium uhligii var. obtusifolium, also known as a variety of the Clinopodium uhligii plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Clinopodium uhligii var. obtusifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
